{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matano Shrine'''|茨田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
